description: A maintenance script malfunction has evicted all production workloads by applying an aggressive NoExecute taint to the cluster's worker node. Remediate the node's taints, correct node labels, and update specific workload tolerations to restore the cluster to a healthy state without violating intended topology constraints. Remove the accidental 'maintenance=underway:NoExecute' taint from the node while preserving the intentional 'workload-type=stateful:NoSchedule' taint. Update the 'database-primary' deployment in the 'app-prod' namespace to tolerate the stateful taint and add the 'role=batch-processor' label to the node so the 'batch-worker' deployment pods can schedule. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
